name: Sunshine Limo
recent_news: Founder Brad Kugel ('Mr. Sunshine') of Sunshine Limousine in Manitowoc passed away per obituary; company appears to be a small limo / special-mobility operator, not a school-bus contractor. Status of business post-founder unclear.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Limousine / private transport business with no evidence of school-bus contracting; founder is deceased and operating status is unclear. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Evans Transportation
recent_news: Legal entity Rick Evans Transportation Inc, dba Evans Transportation; 13 power units, 8 drivers per FMCSA SAFER as of June 2025 review with Satisfactory safety rating, zero crashes / zero OOS in trailing 24 months. Hires school bus drivers for daily routes.
fit_notes: Marginal fit: small (~13 buses) independent family operator in remote far-northern CA (Siskiyou County). Clean safety record and school/charter mix attractive but sub-scale and geographically isolated from any obvious Summit cluster; would be a true bolt-on only if Summit builds a NorCal beachhead.

name: School Time Transit Corp
districts_or_customers: Morris/Sussex County NJ school districts (likely; based in Lake Hopatcong)
recent_news: Listed among NJ DOE registered school-bus contractors (NJ DOE contractor codes). Very small operator (~7 employees, ~$1.4M revenue) with no public web presence beyond directory listings.
fit_notes: Possible tiny tuck-in in northern NJ (Morris/Sussex). Likely sub-scale (<15 buses) and would need direct outreach to confirm route count and owner intent; NJ market is dense with similar mom-and-pop contractors making roll-up potentially attractive if clustered with other Summit NJ targets.

name: Haley Transportation
districts_or_customers: St. Charles Public Schools (sole/primary district contract for regular routes and activities)
recent_news: Legal name Haley Transportation of St Charles Inc; BBB-listed, USDOT 1010453; provides all bus transportation for St. Charles Public Schools (regular routes + activities) per district website.
fit_notes: Classic small family contractor with exclusive single-district relationship (St. Charles Public Schools, MN). Sticky contract and clean independent status, but sub-scale (~8 employees) and single-customer concentration; useful only as part of a broader MN cluster acquisition strategy.

name: School Plus Shuttle LLC
recent_news: No public web presence found; registered at a residential address (16943 Nevisway St, Houston) suggesting a very small owner-operator LLC. Could not confirm active operations or any school-district contracts.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 4 employees and a home-address LLC indicates a micro owner-operator with no fleet or scale; likely serves a handful of private-school or daycare shuttle runs. Below Summit tuck-in threshold.
